creator: gjb@FreeBSD.org
text:
Update textproc/igor: 1.170 -> 1.224

o Update SGML tag list
o Allow custom specification of line length (-L)
o Performance improvements in various areas
o Add various commonly misspelled words
o Add the igor(1) manual page
o Allow custom specification of line ranges to check (-C)

Tinderbox logs can be found at:

http://builder.glenbarber.us/tb/logs/10-64-FreeBSD/igor-1.224.log

http://builder.glenbarber.us/tb/logs/9-32-FreeBSD/igor-1.224.log
http://builder.glenbarber.us/tb/logs/8-32-FreeBSD/igor-1.224.log
http://builder.glenbarber.us/tb/logs/7-32-FreeBSD/igor-1.224.log

Fix: Patch is attached.


Patch attached with submission follows:
